# Hadi Abou Daya — AI/ML Engineer & Consultant

> Personal portfolio and blog of Hadi Abou Daya, an AI/ML Engineer & Consultant based in Paris, France. Building intelligent systems from edge to cloud.

## Site Structure

- [Home](https://hadi.aboudaya.com/): Overview, hero section, and highlights
- [About](https://hadi.aboudaya.com/about/): Bio, key facts, languages, and personal journey
- [Experience](https://hadi.aboudaya.com/experience/): Career timeline from 2018 to present
- [Events](https://hadi.aboudaya.com/events/): Workshops, conferences, hackathons, and milestones
- [Certifications](https://hadi.aboudaya.com/certifications/): Industry-recognized certifications and courses (AWS, Azure, PMP, AI/ML)
- [Blog](https://hadi.aboudaya.com/blog/): Articles on AI, machine learning, causal inference, and engineering
- [Contact](https://hadi.aboudaya.com/contact/): Contact form and information

## Key Topics

- Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
- LLM Agents and Large Language Models
- Cloud Computing (AWS, Azure)
- Computer Vision
- Causal Inference
- Edge AI and IoT

## About Hadi Abou Daya

Hadi Abou Daya is an AI/ML Engineer & Consultant based in Paris. He specializes in building intelligent systems spanning edge devices to cloud-scale infrastructure. His expertise includes LLM agents, computer vision, and cloud architecture. He holds industry-recognized certifications across AI, cloud, and project management, and actively participates in conferences and hackathons.

- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/hadiad
- GitHub: https://github.com/HadiAbouDaya
- Website: https://hadi.aboudaya.com
